'''Ylan Ghalir''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who designed and produced the [[Leviathan Power Armor]] for use by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Ghalir was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and taken to an Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]].
